title: leucas urticifolia var. annulata
intro: Leucas urticifolia var. annulata, also known as annual leucas, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia and Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, attributed to its essential oils and bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Leucas urticifolia var. annulata include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and skin infections, as well as its antiseptic and antispasmodic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or ointments, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote wound healing and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues.
